test.name: Alert Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Alert Should Not Be Present
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Alert Text: Press a button! Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Press a button!} (Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a04596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0ee84f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a092b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a093a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aacd3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aac7a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aaebca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a5072ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a50fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4d75c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]
ValueError: Invalid alert action 'PRESS A BUTTON!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that no alert is present.
kw.status: ValueError: Invalid alert action 'PRESS A BUTTON!'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: ValueError: Invalid alert action 'PRESS A BUTTON!'.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (747, 665). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a04596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a8225] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a5e43] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a3197] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a2060] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a094a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0c8e6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0942d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0edcf4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a092b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a093a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aacd3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aac7a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aaebca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a5072ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a50fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4d75c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (747, 665). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a04596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a8225] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a5e43] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a3197] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a2060] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a094a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0c8e6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0942d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0edcf4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a092b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a093a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aacd3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aac7a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aaebca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a5072ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a50fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4d75c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Capture Element Screenshot
kw.doc: Captures a screenshot from the element identified by ``locator`` and embeds it into log file.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

errors.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Alert Text: Press a button!
